reason: Applying a FIPS:STIG crypto policy modifies system-wide cryptographic algorithms, which can remove non‑FIPS ciphers and MACs. This may prevent SSH connections or break services that rely on algorithms not permitted by FIPS, posing a risk of lockout or service disruption.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; potential loss of SSH connectivity; service incompatibility with FIPS mode; system-wide cryptographic changes
